info.name: Gateway API Collection (Detailed)
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection detailing all unified Gateway endpoints. 

**Required Environment Variables:**
- `gateway_url`: The base URL, e.g., `http://localhost:7032`
- `app_id`: Application ID UUID context
- `tenant_id`: Tenant UUID context
- `jwt_token`: Bearer token for authorized requests.

request.description:
**Get All Apps**

This endpoint executes the `GetAllApps` operation. 

**Authorization Context:**
Publicly accessible endpoint (No authentication required).

originalRequest.description:
**Get All Apps**

This endpoint executes the `GetAllApps` operation. 

**Authorization Context:**
Publicly accessible endpoint (No authentication required).

request.description:
**Create App**

This endpoint executes the `CreateApp` operation. 

**Authorization Context:**
Requires 'ManageApps' claim.

originalRequest.description:
**Create App**

This endpoint executes the `CreateApp` operation. 

**Authorization Context:**
Requires 'ManageApps' claim.

request.description:
**Get App By Id**

This endpoint executes the `GetAppById` operation. 

**Authorization Context:**
Requires 'AccessAll' or 'ManageApps' claim, OR all of ('AssignApps', 'EditApps', 'CreateApps').

originalRequest.description:
**Get App By Id**

This endpoint executes the `GetAppById` operation. 

**Authorization Context:**
Requires 'AccessAll' or 'ManageApps' claim, OR all of ('AssignApps', 'EditApps', 'CreateApps').

body.raw:
{
    "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002",
    "name": "Wissler Admin",
    "description": "Wissler Administrator Dashboard",
    "baseUrl": "http://localhost:3004",
    "externalAuthProvidersJson": "[\"google\", \"facebook\", \"twitter\", \"linkedin\"]",
    "privacyPolicy": "# Wissler Admin Privacy Policy\nThis is the privacy policy for the Wissler Admin application.",
    "termsAndConditions": "# Wissler Admin Terms and Conditions\nBy using Wissler Admin, you agree to these terms.",
    "isActive": true,
    "verificationType": 1,
    "requiresAdminApproval": true,
    "domainEvents": [],
    "sysConfig": {
        "theme": "dark",
        "collapsedmenu": true
    },
    "notifications": {
        "email": true,
        "push": true,
        "sms": false
    }
}

request.description:
**Update App**

This endpoint executes the `UpdateApp` operation. 

**Authorization Context:**
Requires 'AccessAll' or 'ManageApps' claim, OR all of ('AssignApps', 'EditApps', 'CreateApps').

body.raw:
{
    "id": "400c3b9f-8dbe-4c78-96e9-07ef54bd1614",
    "name": "Example Name",
    "description": "Detailed description of the resource.",
    "baseUrl": "https://example.com",
    "externalAuthProvidersJson": "[\"google\", \"facebook\"]",
    "privacyPolicy": "# sample privacy policy",
    "termsAndConditions": "# sample terms",
    "isActive": true,
    "verificationType": 0,
    "requiresAdminApproval": false,
    "sysConfig": {
        "theme": "light",
        "collapsedmenu": false
    },
    "notifications": {
        "email": true,
        "push": true,
        "sms": true
    }
}
